item.title: F-003c: Image Rendering
item.intent: Images referenced in markdown must render inline in rich view — broken paths must show a clear placeholder, not a blank space
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-038 (Parser), FEAT-003 (Core Rendering). Render images from relative and absolute paths inline in rich view. Images scale to fit content width with aspect ratio preserved. Broken/missing image paths show a placeholder icon with the alt text. Supports common formats: PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP, SVG (render as bitmap).
acceptanceCriteria: Image with valid relative path renders inline at appropriate size
Image scales to content width and preserves aspect ratio
Broken image path shows placeholder icon with alt text displayed
Very large image (5000x5000px) does not cause memory spike or lag
GIF renders as static first frame (animated GIF support is P2)
